case_id: Mississippi River near Greenville, MS (33.4000°N, 91.0500°W to 33.2500°N, 91.2000°W)

pi_items.source: USGS and NOAA Gauge Data (33.29N, -91.16W for Greenville Bridge)
USACE River Mile Markers (Mile 531.3 at Greenville)

privileged_info_summary: The Mississippi River segment near Greenville, MS, is defined by start coordinates (33.4000, -91.0500) and end coordinates (33.2500, -91.2000). The straight-line distance between these points is approximately 21.8 km. The channel length of this reach is estimated between 35 and 40 km. The resulting sinuosity index is approximately 1.6 to 1.8, which classifies this section of the river as 'Meandering'.
